description: Deterministic unit-level correctness tests for CipherChannel. Covers packet-length invariants, counter serialisation and exhaustion, direction parity, malformed-input rejection, and the protocol test vector.
run_host: laptop — fedora.home, 12th Gen Intel i7-12650H, Fedora Linux 7.0.11-200.fc44.x86_64
subsections: A1 — Packet-length invariants (plaintext sizes: 0,1,15,16,17,31,32,63,64,127,128,399,400, oversized send, oversized receive)
A2 — Counter behaviour (first nonces, parity, LE serialisation, boundary values, exhaustion, missed packets)
A3 — Malformed-input rejection (empty, short, oversized, tampered, bad version, corrupt state, endpoint mismatch)
A4 — Protocol test vector (PROTOCOL.md §15, zero key, pt=b'test')
